Также иранцы опровергли смешной вброс от правительства США про то, что США обеспечили прохождение танкера через пролив. Данное заявление потом стыдливо удалили.

Фактически, заявления Трампа о том, что раз в проливе нет кораблей и мин, значит там можно безопасно плыть, вполне ожидаемо столкнулись с суровой реальностью.
text_translated:
The Iranian Navy reported that control of the Strait of Hormuz is carried out by missiles and drones.
There are currently no mine laying in the strait, nor are there any Iranian ships. 
The Iranians also denied the funny story from the US government that the US ensured the passage of the tanker through the strait. This statement was later bashfully deleted.

In fact, Trump’s statements that since there are no ships or mines in the strait, it means it is safe to sail there, quite expectedly faced harsh reality.

text:
Поджигай звездно-полосатый рай

С начала обострения в Персидском заливе иранские войска нанесли десятки ударов по различным аэродромам, портам и логистическим центрам. США окружили Иран базами, а по ним, как оказалось, можно стрелять

Наиболее заметный ущерб понес штаб 5-го флота ВМС США в Бахрейне. Кадры с огромным столбом дыма облетели практически все мировые СМИ. КСИР удалось поразить весьма важные объекты, такие как радары загоризонтного обнаружения ракетных пусков в ОАЭ, Катаре и Иордании.

А еще удалось добиться весьма заметного ущерба в Кувейте. Именно ПВО Кувейта показало себя «лучше всего», но есть нюанс. На американских базах в этой маленькой стране пропущены десятки попаданий, зато сбиты дружественным огнем не менее 3 F-15 вооруженных сил США.

А вот проиранские формирования в Ираке, которые вроде бы наносили удары беспилотниками и различными РСЗО по объектам США в так называемой «зеленой зоне» Багдада, а также по базе «Виктория» рядом с багдадским аэропортом, результатами не отметились. Каких-то свидетельств попаданий не отмечено, поэтому их активность оставим за скобками.

Еще одной целью частых ударов становился Эрбиль, а также некоторые объекты курдов в Иракском Курдистане. Однако и там основной ущерб нанесли пуски ракет и БЛА из Ирана, нежели хаотичные обстрелы проиранских формирований (и в большинстве своем лишь в сети).

Наиболее дальними пораженными объектами, если не считать территорию Израиля, стали база Акротири на Кипре, Ас-Салти в Иордании, а также Принц Султан в Саудовской Аравии. Причем в Иране отрицают удары по Саудии, а кто смог попасть по Кипру — так и не выяснилось.

Есть заявления и о других ударах, но, в отличие от всех вышеперечисленных, они пока не подтверждаются ни кадрами объективного контроля, ни чьими бы то ни было словами, кроме проиранских неофициальных ресурсов, которые временами, мягко говоря, склонны преувеличивать собственные успехи.

Даже с учетом весьма тяжелых ударов, которые выдерживает сейчас Иран от израильской и американской авиации, нельзя сказать, что это игра в одни ворота. Помимо сугубо военных объектов, КСИР удалось поразить критически важную инфраструктуру в странах, где есть военные базы США. А как это сказалось на экономике этих стран – можно увидеть по хаосу и панике среди населения.

@rybar_mena
text_translated:
Set fire to the stars and stripes paradise

Since the beginning of the escalation in the Persian Gulf, Iranian troops have carried out dozens of attacks on various airfields, ports and logistics centers. The US has surrounded Iran with bases, and, as it turns out, you can shoot at them

The most noticeable damage was suffered by the US Navy's 5th Fleet headquarters in Bahrain. Footage of a huge column of smoke spread across almost all the world's media. The IRGC managed to hit very important targets, such as over-the-horizon radars for detecting missile launches in the UAE, Qatar and Jordan.

We also managed to achieve very noticeable damage in Kuwait. It was Kuwait’s air defense that showed itself “best”, but there is a nuance. At American bases in this small country, dozens of hits were missed, but at least 3 F-15s of the US armed forces were shot down by friendly fire.

But the pro-Iranian formations in Iraq, which allegedly carried out attacks with drones and various MLRS on US targets in the so-called “green zone” of Baghdad, as well as on the Victoria base near the Baghdad airport, did not show any results. There was no evidence of hits, so we will leave their activity out of the picture.

Another target of frequent strikes was Erbil, as well as some Kurdish targets in Iraqi Kurdistan. However, even there, the main damage was caused by missile and UAV launches from Iran, rather than by chaotic shelling of pro-Iranian formations (and mostly only online).

The most distant targets, not counting the territory of Israel, were the Akrotiri base in Cyprus, Al-Salti in Jordan, and Prince Sultan in Saudi Arabia. Moreover, Iran denies attacks on Saudi Arabia, and who was able to hit Cyprus has never been clarified.

There are statements about other strikes, but, unlike all of the above, they have not yet been confirmed either by objective monitoring personnel or by anyone’s words other than pro-Iranian unofficial resources, which at times, to put it mildly, tend to exaggerate their own successes.

Even taking into account the very heavy blows that Iran is now withstanding from Israeli and American aircraft, one cannot say that this is a one-goal game. In addition to purely military targets, the IRGC managed to hit critical infrastructure in countries where there are US military bases. And how this affected the economies of these countries can be seen in the chaos and panic among the population.

@rybar_mena

text:

Более 300 спутников Jilin-1 записывают каждую деталь, секунда за секундой, от загрузки боеприпасов до траекторий ракет.
Китай превращает военную доктрину США в базу данных, включая время заправки и ответные действия ПВО.
По мнению экспертов, эти данные могут дать Китаю преимущество в военных исследованиях и разработках, которое продлится десятилетия.
Военная тактика США тщательно анализируется."

China is turning US military doctrine into a database, including refueling times and air defense responses.
Experts say the data could give China an advantage in military research and development that could last for decades.
US military tactics are being carefully analyzed."

Summary of the Russian Ministry of Defense on the progress of the SVO as of March 10, 2026.

Group of troops “North”: The mechanized and air assault brigades were hit near Miropol, Maksimovshchina, Novaya Sich and Yastrebinoy (Sumy region). In the Kharkov region, 3 mechanized, motorized infantry brigades and a border detachment near Verkhnyaya Pisarevka, Martovoye and Buzovo (Kharkov region) were hit.
– Losses of the Ukrainian Armed Forces: up to 240 military personnel, 3 armored fighting vehicles, 11 vehicles, 3 field artillery guns, 2 electronic warfare stations, 2 ammunition depots, 7 material warehouses were destroyed.

Group of troops "West": Improved tactical position. 3 mechanized, assault brigades and 2 defensive brigades were hit near Aleksandrovka, Palamarevka (Kharkov region), Krasny Liman, Svyatogorsk and Lozovoy (DPR).
– Losses of the Ukrainian Armed Forces: over 190 military personnel, 2 armored fighting vehicles, 10 vehicles, 4 artillery pieces, 1 AN/TPQ-50 counter-battery station (USA), 3 ammunition depots were destroyed.

Group of troops "South": Advantageous positions are occupied. 3 mechanized, airmobile, assault and mountain assault brigades were hit near Slavyansk, Kramatorsk, Krivoy Luka, Piskunovka and Konstantinovka (DPR).
– Ukrainian Armed Forces losses: over 145 military personnel, 2 Stryker armored personnel carriers (USA), 1 MaxxPro armored vehicle (USA), 5 vehicles, 4 field artillery guns, 1 ammunition warehouse, 6 material warehouses destroyed.

Group of troops "Center": Improved tactical position. 4 mechanized, Jaeger, airmobile, airborne assault brigades, an assault regiment, marines, teroborone and 3 national guard brigades were struck near Novoaleksandrovka, Grishino, Belitsky, Zolotoy Kolodez (DPR) and Novopavlovka (Dnepropetrovsk region).
– Ukrainian Armed Forces losses: up to 325 military personnel, 3 armored fighting vehicles, 15 vehicles, 2 electronic warfare stations destroyed.

Group of troops “Vostok”: Advancement into the depth of defense. 2 mechanized, 2 assault brigades and 5 assault regiments were hit at Komsomolsky, Vozdvizhevka (Zaporozhye region), Starokasyanovsky, Dobropasovo and Krivobokovo (Dnepropetrovsk region).
– Ukrainian Armed Forces losses: over 300 military personnel, 2 armored fighting vehicles, 2 vehicles, 1 M777 howitzer (USA).

Group of troops “Dnepr”: The mechanized and mountain assault brigades were hit near Orekhov, Grigorovka and Kamyshevakha (Zaporozhye region).
– Up to 65 military Ukrainian Armed Forces, 1 artillery gun, 9 vehicles, 5 electronic warfare stations, 1 ammunition warehouse, 1 material warehouse were destroyed.

Strikes by the Russian Aerospace Forces: Energy and transport infrastructure facilities, storage sites, preparation and launch of long-range strike UAVs, and deployment points of Ukrainian formations and mercenaries in 144 regions were hit.
– 1 Su-27 aircraft of the Ukrainian Air Force was shot down.

Air defense: 8 guided bombs, 3 HIMARS shells (USA), 241 UAVs were shot down.

Трамп угрожает Ирану геноцидом

Трамп пригрозил уничтожить Иран как государство, если продолжится блокада Ормузского пролива.

США нанесут удар в двадцать раз сильнее. Мы уничтожим легко уязвимые цели, что сделает практически невозможным когда-либо снова восстановить Иран как государство - на них обрушатся смерть, огонь и ярость.

- заявил президент США.

Лариджани отреагировал на угрозы Трампа и заявил, что иранский народ не боится пустых угроз.

Те, кто был сильнее вас, тоже не смогли уничтожить народ Ирана. Берегите себя, чтобы самим не быть ликвидированными.

— написал Лариджани.

@hizbullahru
text_translated:
Trump threatens Iran with genocide

Trump has threatened to destroy Iran as a state if the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz continues.

The US will strike twenty times harder. We will destroy soft targets, making it virtually impossible to ever rebuild Iran as a state again - death, fire and fury will fall upon them.

- said the US President.

Larijani responded to Trump's threats and said that the Iranian people are not afraid of empty threats.

Those who were stronger than you were also unable to destroy the people of Iran. Take care of yourself so as not to be liquidated.

— Larijani wrote.

@hizbullahru

text:
Еще успехи на Покровском

После освобождения Гришино к северо-западу от Покровска российские войска продолжили закреплять успех на его подступах.

Севернее Гришино штурмовым группам удалось зачистить несколько посадок и продвинуться вплотную к Новоалександровке.

Сейчас бои идут в районе самого села. Также нашим подразделениям удалось занять дорогу от населенного пункта к Родинскому.

В Родинском наши войска смогли зачистить северную окраину и наконец-то освободить населенник полностью.

Кроме того, после нескольких месяцев украинского присутствия штурмовые подразделения заняли Сухецкого и лишили ВСУ кармана на этом участке.

Благодаря этим успехам наши передовые группы смогли выровнять линию фронта и стабилизировать ситуацию, лишив противника плацдарма у Родинского, что теперь упростит дальнейшее движение к Белицкому.

@rusich_army
text_translated:
More successes at Pokrovsky

After the liberation of Grishino, northwest of Pokrovsk, Russian troops continued to consolidate their success on its outskirts.

North of Grishino, the assault groups managed to clear several plantings and advance close to Novoaleksandrovka.

Now the fighting is going on in the area of ​​the village itself. Our units also managed to occupy the road from the settlement to Rodinsky.

In Rodinsky, our troops were able to clear the northern outskirts and finally liberate the population completely.

In addition, after several months of Ukrainian presence, assault units occupied Sukhetsky and deprived the Ukrainian Armed Forces of Ukraine of its pocket in this area.

Thanks to these successes, our advanced groups were able to level the front line and stabilize the situation, depriving the enemy of a bridgehead at Rodinsky, which will now simplify further movement towards Belitsky.

@rusich_army

Штурмовые подразделения группировки войск "Восток" продолжают продвижение на запад и северо-запад от Гуляй-поля. Продолжаются разведывательно-поисковые действия на севере (Орестополь, Гай, Новоалександровка), а также уничтожение групп усиления в районах прифронтовых населенных пунктов: Великомихайловка, Коломийцы, Добропасово, Александровка, Воздвижевка, Верхняя Терса, Зарница.

Противник активных наступательных действий не вел, сосредоточившись на усилении и ротации личного состава на передовых позициях. За ночь вскрыто и в результате огневого воздействия уничтожено 2 ББМ, 2 пикапа, а также экскаватор-погрузчик в районе н.п. Новоскелетоватое.

The situation in the zone of responsibility of the Vostok group of troops over the past night

Assault units of the Vostok group of troops continue to advance west and north-west from Gulyai-Polye. Reconnaissance and search operations continue in the north (Orestopol, Gai, Novoaleksandrovka), as well as the destruction of reinforcement groups in the areas of front-line settlements: Velikomikhailovka, Kolomiytsy, Dobropasovo, Aleksandrovka, Vozdvizhevka, Verkhnyaya Tersa, Zarnitsa.

The enemy did not conduct active offensive operations, concentrating on strengthening and rotating personnel in forward positions. text:
Президент Южной Кореи пожаловался, что США забирают из Южной Кореи ЗРК "Пэтриот" на Ближний Восток.

“Мы выступаем против переброски американских систем ПВО Patriot, размещенных на Корейском полуострове, на Ближний Восток, но мы не в том положении, чтобы выдвигать требования по этому вопросу” (с) 

Такая судьба марионеток, которые подчинены внешнему контуру управления.  Разительный контраст с Северной Кореей, которая сама определяет свою политику. 

Переброска же THAAD и "Пэтриот" из Южной Кореи на Ближний Восток является следствием понесенных потерь в ЗРК и радарах. США просто оказались не готовы к той войне, которую навязывает Иран, отсюда подобные спешные действия, которые безусловно обрадуют Китай и КНДР.
text_translated:
The President of South Korea complained that the United States was taking the Patriot air defense system from South Korea to the Middle East.

“We oppose the transfer of American Patriot air defense systems located on the Korean Peninsula to the Middle East, but we are not in a position to make demands on this issue” (c) 

This is the fate of puppets who are subordinate to the external control circuit.  A stark contrast with North Korea, which determines its own policies. 

The transfer of THAAD and Patriot from South Korea to the Middle East is a consequence of losses suffered in air defense systems and radars. The United States simply turned out to be unprepared for the war that Iran is imposing, hence such hasty actions that will certainly please China and the DPRK.

text:
После вчерашней нефтяной паники, когда фьючерсы на нефть начали достигать 120 долларов за баррель, Трампа вечером срочно позвонил Путину для обсуждения ситуации на Ближнем Востоке, после чего объявил, что США начнут снимать санкции с нефтянки целого ряда страна. РФ он прямо не назвал, но это подразумевалось. После этого нефть снова упала менее 100 долларов за баррель.

Но при этом сам Ормузский пролив несмотря на болтовню Трампа по-прежнему закрыт, танкеры просто бояться там перемещаться.
Ряд крупных судовладельцев полностью свернули судоходство в регионе. Иран прямо заявляет, что готов пропускать суда тех стран, которые вышлют послов США и Израиля. Соглашение о пропуске судов у Ирана есть только с Китаем. Ну и российские суда видимо будут пропускать, но наших судов там немного. При этом Трамп уже заявлял, что Орумузский пролив открыт и плавать там безопасно, что иранский флот не сможет помешать передвижению, что США могут организовывать конвои, что США могут страховать суда в Ормузском проливе, что США захватят Ормузский пролив и так далее. Происходящее явно планом не предполагалось.

Как представляется, ключевым фактором паники Трампа является рост цен на бензин в США. За неделю войны они выросли на 17%. И выбор у него не велик - либо искать, как выбросить на рынок больше нефти (в том числе из России), либо же распечатывать стратегические запасы, как это делал Байден. За что Трамп его же критиковал.

Американские СМИ сообщают, что в окружении Трампа призывают его срочно сворачивать войну, которая зашла куда-то не туда, покуда Трамп как резанный кричит о перемогах и как он всех разгромит. События же развиваются в каком-то другом направлении, тем более, что Иран от переговоров отказывается.
text_translated:
After yesterday's oil panic, when oil futures began to reach $120 per barrel, Trump urgently called Putin in the evening to discuss the situation in the Middle East, after which he announced that the United States would begin to lift sanctions on the oil industry in a number of countries. He did not directly name the Russian Federation, but it was implied. After that, oil fell back below $100 a barrel.

But at the same time, the Strait of Hormuz itself, despite Trump’s chatter, is still closed; tankers are simply afraid to move there.
A number of large shipowners have completely curtailed shipping in the region. Iran directly states that it is ready to allow ships from those countries that expel the ambassadors of the United States and Israel to pass through. Iran only has an agreement on the passage of ships with China. Well, Russian ships will apparently be allowed through, but there are few of our ships there. At the same time, Trump has already stated that the Strait of Orumuz is open and safe to navigate there, that the Iranian fleet will not be able to interfere with movement, that the United States can organize convoys, that the United States can insure ships in the Strait of Hormuz, that the United States will seize the Strait of Hormuz, and so on. What was happening was clearly not planned.

The key factor behind Trump's panic appears to be rising gasoline prices in the United States. During the week of the war they grew by 17%. And he doesn’t have much choice - either look for how to release more oil onto the market (including from Russia), or print out strategic reserves, as Biden did. Why did Trump criticize him?

The American media report that those around Trump are calling on him to urgently wind down the war, which has gone somewhere wrong, while Trump is screaming like crazy about victories and how he will defeat everyone. Events are developing in some other direction, especially since Iran refuses negotiations.

«Мы категорически не стремимся к прекращению огня. Убеждены, что агрессора надо ударить по лицу, чтобы он усвоил урок и не никогда более не думал об агрессии в отношении дорого Ирана.  
Иран собирается разрушить порочную петлю — «война-переговоры-перемирие и затем снова война» (с) спикер парламента Ирана Галибаф

За предыдущий год ликвидировали 79 ячеек террористов: 2,5 тыс. бандитов и их пособников задержали и еще 27 уничтожили при оказании сопротивления.

Угроза терактов для РФ при нынешнем режиме на Украине будет обостряться с ухудшением дел в ВСУ, но российские спецслужбы готовы к этому.

In 2025, Russian special services managed to prevent 308 terrorist attacks, including explosions of homemade bombs and shooting at transport facilities.

Over the previous year, 79 terrorist cells were liquidated: 2.5 thousand bandits and their accomplices were detained and another 27 were destroyed while resisting.

The threat of terrorist attacks for the Russian Federation under the current regime in Ukraine will worsen with the deterioration of affairs in the Armed Forces of Ukraine, but the Russian special services are ready for this.

(c) FSB Director Bortnikov

text:
Спикер Корпуса стражей исламской революции (КСИР) Али Мохаммед Наини обвинил президента США Дональда Трампа во лжи, призванной скрыть неудачи американских военных в регионе

По его словам, американские военные корабли и самолеты отступили более чем на 1000 километров, чтобы избежать иранских ракет, а американские солдаты покинули базы и укрылись в отелях по всему региону.

Он заявил, что иранские ракеты сейчас мощнее, чем в начале войны, с боеголовками, превышающими тонну, и что сирены продолжают звучать по всей территории Израиля.

Он предупредил, что Иран не допустит экспорта ни одного литра нефти из региона враждебным сторонам и их партнерам до дальнейшего уведомления, заявив:  «Мы готовы расширить войну. Безопасность будет для всех, и отсутствие безопасности — для всех. Именно мы определим конец войны».

Это вас заперли со мной (с)

Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) spokesman Ali Mohammed Naini accused US President Donald Trump of lying to cover up the failures of the US military in the region

He said American warships and aircraft had retreated more than 1,000 kilometers to avoid Iranian missiles, and American soldiers had abandoned bases and taken refuge in hotels across the region.

He said Iranian missiles are now more powerful than at the start of the war, with warheads exceeding a ton, and that sirens continue to sound throughout Israel.

He warned that Iran would not allow a single liter of oil to be exported from the region to hostile parties and their partners until further notice, saying:  “We are ready to expand the war. There will be security for everyone, and insecurity for everyone. It is we who will determine the end of the war."

It was you who were locked up with me (c)

text:
Китайский фактор

Как известно, спрос рождает предложение – особенно когда речь идёт о войне. После встречи администрации Трампа с руководителями крупнейших оборонных корпораций США стало известно, что американские производители уже наращивают выпуск ключевых видов вооружений.

Сам Трамп поспешил опровергнуть сообщения о том, что удары по Ирану якобы быстро истощают американские запасы. По его словам, расширение производства началось ещё за несколько месяцев до встречи, а многие предприятия уже работают на повышенных оборотах. 

Между тем, на встрече в Белом доме присутствовали руководители ведущих оборонных концернов – BAE Systems, Boeing, Honeywell Aerospace, L3Harris Technologies, Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman и RTX Corporation. По итогам переговоров компании согласились ускорить расширение производственных мощностей – в отдельных сегментах речь идёт о кратном увеличении выпуска ВТО.

Как отмечают американские пропагандисты, некоторые договорённости уже начали реализовываться. 
Например, Lockheed Martin увеличивает производство перехватчиков для систем THAAD и Patriot. Компания RTX Corporation расширяет выпуск ракет AIM-120 AMRAAM, SM-3 Block IIA, SM-6 и КР Tomahawk, а также возобновляет производство версии SM-3 Block IB.

Параллельно Пентагон готовит запрос на дополнительное финансирование примерно на 50 млрд долл. 
Средства планируется направить прежде всего на восполнение запасов вооружений, использованных в недавних «операциях» — от «Томагавков» до дронов.

Однако у этого процесса есть и менее удобная сторона, о которой в Белом доме говорить не принято. 

Значительная часть американского производства зависит от поставок редкоземов, а их глобальным центром добычи и переработки до сих пор остаётся Китай. В этом и заключается парадокс современной оборонной политики США.

@Belarus_VPO
text_translated:
Chinese factor

As you know, demand creates supply - especially when it comes to war. After a meeting of the Trump administration with the heads of the largest US defense corporations, it became known that American manufacturers are already increasing the production of key types of weapons.

Trump himself hastened to refute reports that strikes on Iran were allegedly rapidly depleting American reserves. According to him, the expansion of production began several months before the meeting, and many enterprises are already operating at increased speed. 

Meanwhile, the meeting at the White House was attended by the heads of leading defense concerns - BAE Systems, Boeing, Honeywell Aerospace, L3Harris Technologies, Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman and RTX Corporation. As a result of the negotiations, the companies agreed to accelerate the expansion of production capacities - in certain segments we are talking about a multiple increase in WTO output.

As American propagandists note, some agreements have already begun to be implemented. 
For example, Lockheed Martin is increasing production of interceptors for the THAAD and Patriot systems. RTX Corporation is expanding production of the AIM-120 AMRAAM, SM-3 Block IIA, SM-6 and Tomahawk missiles, and is also resuming production of the SM-3 Block IB version.

In parallel, the Pentagon is preparing a request for additional funding of approximately $50 billion. 
The funds are planned to be used primarily to replenish stocks of weapons used in recent “operations” - from Tomahawks to drones.

However, this process also has a less convenient side, which is not customary to talk about in the White House. 

A significant part of American production depends on the supply of rare earths, and China still remains the global center for their production and processing. This is the paradox of modern US defense policy.

@Belarus_VPO

Поставки из Ирана и Африки также продолжаются, но Пекин всё больше смещает закупки в сторону более дешёвой российской нефти.

text_translated:
China increases oil imports by 16% amid risk of supply disruptions - Bloomberg

In January-February 2026, China imported 96.9 million tons of crude oil, which is 16% more than a year earlier. The purchases go to replenish commercial and strategic reserves in case of disruption due to a possible protracted war over Iran.

The main increase in supplies came from Russia - its share reached about 16% of Chinese imports, and purchases increased by about 18%. China is actively buying Urals and ESPO grades, taking advantage of discounts on Russian oil.

Supplies from Iran and Africa also continue, but Beijing is increasingly shifting purchases towards cheaper Russian oil.

Особенно уязвимы Азия и Европа. Многие страны получают большую часть нефти именно с Ближнего Востока — например, Япония около 95%.

text:
Почему война на Ближнем Востоке может сыграть на руку Кремлю?

Рост цен на нефть неожиданно усилил позиции России, пишет Politico. 

После ударов по иранской нефтяной инфраструктуре поставки через Ормузский пролив сократились, а мировые цены поднялись выше 100 долларов за баррель — впервые с лета 2022 года.

Для Москвы это серьёзная передышка. Российский бюджет сильно зависит от экспорта нефти, а ещё недавно доходы от энергоресурсов падали. 

Из-за санкций, высоких ставок и дефицита рабочей силы экономика России начала испытывать давление. Власти даже обсуждали сокращение расходов.

Теперь ситуация изменилась. Высокие цены позволяют России продавать нефть дороже, в том числе Индии и Китаю. 

Более того, США временно разрешили Индии продолжить закупки российской нефти, чтобы избежать глобального дефицита.

text_translated:

Rising oil prices unexpectedly strengthened Russia's position, writes Politico. 

After attacks on Iran's oil infrastructure, supplies through the Strait of Hormuz were reduced, and world prices rose above $100 per barrel for the first time since the summer of 2022.

This is a serious break for Moscow. The Russian budget is heavily dependent on oil exports, and until recently, energy revenues were falling. 

Due to sanctions, high rates and labor shortages, the Russian economy began to come under pressure. The authorities even discussed cutting costs.

Now the situation has changed. High prices allow Russia to sell oil at higher prices, including to India and China. 

Moreover, the US has temporarily allowed India to continue purchasing Russian oil to avoid a global shortage.

text:

Мишенью часто становятся украинские военные, использующие Signal для координации.

Having received the code, hackers can read correspondence and gain access to group chats.

Google has previously warned about such attacks. They involve groups UNC5792, UNC4221 and APT44 (Sandworm), which is associated with Russian intelligence. 

The Ukrainian military, which uses Signal for coordination, is often targeted. 

The encryption of the messenger itself has not been hacked.

Одному из задержанных — диабетику — помощь оказали только после того, как он потерял сознание. 

На мужчин оказывали давление и не позволяли давать показания на украинском (только на русском).

Доказательств вины венгерские власти не нашли, но всё равно депортировали украинцев и запретили им въезд в страны Шенгена на три года. Деньги и золото так и не вернули. 

МИД Украины требует вернуть автомобили «Ощадбанка» и перевозимые ценности, а также наказать виновных в нарушении прав задержанных.

One of the detainees, a diabetic, was given help only after he lost consciousness.

The Hungarian authorities did not find evidence of guilt, but still deported the Ukrainians and banned them from entering the Schengen countries for three years. The money and gold were never returned. 

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine demands the return of Oschadbank cars and transported valuables, as well as to punish those responsible for violating the rights of detainees.

Мы сохраняем эту неопределённость намеренно — чтобы не делать наших врагов и противников более осведомлёнными».

* Пятая статья НАТО — это принцип коллективной обороны: вооружённое нападение на одного члена альянса рассматривается как нападение на всех, и остальные страны обещают ему помочь. Впервые пятую статью активировали после терактов 11 сентября 2001 года.

text_translated:
⚡️ Is NATO going to war? Rutte hinted at using Article 5

The Alliance Secretary General stated:

“For obvious reasons, we will always retain great uncertainty as to exactly when Article 5 applies.

But if it is involved, we will immediately inform everyone about it.

We maintain this uncertainty on purpose - so as not to make our enemies and adversaries more aware."

* The fifth article of NATO is the principle of collective defense: an armed attack on one member of the alliance is considered an attack on all, and other countries promise to help it. Article 5 was first activated after the terrorist attacks of September 11, 2001.

text:
🩸 Убила подругу и кормила сына человечиной — а теперь пилит россиянкам ноготочки

История иркутянки Олеси Мостовщиковой в 2009 году облетела мировые таблоиды. Тогда женщина убила подругу, расчленила тело и, по данным СМИ, неделю кормила мясом жертвы собственного сына. После преступления она получила срок, но в 2015 году вышла по УДО, сменив фамилию на Янченко.

Некоторое время людоедка жила в том же доме, где произошло убийство. Позже она переехала в посёлок Большой Луг под Иркутском и начала новую жизнь. Сейчас, как выяснили журналисты, Мостовщикова работает мастером маникюра, а её клиентки не знают о её прошлом.

Её сын Илья, фигурировавший в деле, позже оказался в колонии за кражу, подписал контракт и в 2024 году отправился на войну. Через месяц он погиб. Суд отказал матери в получении выплат — деньги передали его бывшей жене и детям.

@nexta_live
text_translated:
🩸 She killed her friend and fed her son human flesh - and now she’s sawing Russian women’s nails

The story of Irkutsk resident Olesya Mostovshchikova in 2009 spread across the world's tabloids. Then the woman killed her friend, dismembered the body and, according to media reports, fed her own son the meat of the victim for a week. After the crime, she received a sentence, but in 2015 she was released on parole, changing her last name to Yanchenko.

For some time the cannibal lived in the same house where the murder took place. Later she moved to the village of Bolshoy Lug near Irkutsk and started a new life. Now, as journalists have found out, Mostovshchikova works as a manicurist, and her clients do not know about her past.

Her son Ilya, who was involved in the case, later ended up in a colony for theft, signed a contract and went to war in 2024. A month later he died. The court denied the mother's request to receive payments - the money was transferred to his ex-wife and children.

🇺🇸🚫🇮🇷 Alsaa analysis/US-Iran War: The West is already bleeding, and this is only the beginning (March 12, 2026)

The Pentagon admits: $11.3 billion wasted in 6 days (mostly ammunition), not counting the real hidden costs. A bill that is skyrocketing while Iran stands firm.
The real trap? The clock: the West has bet on a quick victory, but time is on Iran's side.

Reserves quickly depleted
The IEA (West + allies) has emptied 400 million barrels of strategic reserves (an all-time record, US 172M) to calm Hormuz. That barely covers 20 days of blockage. A band-aid on a hemorrhage.
Persistent threat

Iran has deployed dozens of mines (stockpile of up to 6,000); the strait remains a nightmare for them. Strikes on Qatar → European gas +50-80%, +4,000 flights canceled/day in the Gulf, billions lost.
Oil: already hit $120, and it will rise again
Barrel climbed to ~$119-120 (peak March 9) on fears of a stalemate. Temporary drop ($97 Brent, $93 WTI today) after Trump's promises, but if it lasts: easy return to >$100-120 → global inflation hitting the West hard.

In 30 days?
Empty stocks, massive disruptions, Western economies in disarray (hundreds of billions already). No safety net, guaranteed wear and tear.

🇱🇧🚫🇮🇱 March 11, 2026 – Hezbollah: 24 operations claimed in a single day  "Scattered Dust" series in action 

On Wednesday, March 11, 2026 (21st day of Ramadan 1447 AH), the Islamic Resistance issued 24 military communiqués in response to Israeli strikes on dozens of Lebanese towns and villages, including the southern suburbs of Beirut.

Operations of the day:
Morning/daytime – Border defense:
02:20 → Missile strike on enemy gathering near Manar site
07:00 → Artillery strike on Balat al-Mustaqbal site
10:10 → Rocket salvo on gathering south of Khiam (2nd time)
Evening – Massive "Scattered Dust" barrage (starting at 7:40 p.m.):
Coordinated salvos of rockets, precision missiles, and swarms of 

attack drones on:
Border settlements (5 km evacuation warnings respected by repeated strikes):
Kiryat Shmona (×3)
Nahariya (×2)
Metula (×2)
Avivim, Shitola, Shlomi, Al-Mutilla
Bases and strategic sites in the 

interior:
Mesgaf
Yodefat (military industries)
Umayad & Shamshon bases (north of Tiberias)
Dado HQ (northern region / Safed)
Ain Zitim (west of Safed)
Haifa / Karmel naval and air base
Nesherim (southeast of Haifa)
Rafael industrial complex (north of Haifa)
Stella Maris (coastal maritime control)

text:
🇱🇧🇮🇷 Secretary-General of Hezbollah, Sheikh Naim Qassem, to Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Ali Khamenei (may his shadow endure):
In the Name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

Your Eminence Ayatollah the Leader, Sayyed Mojtaba Ali Khamenei (may his shadow endure),
Peace be upon you, and the mercy and blessings of Allah.

We received with great welcome and pride the news of your eminence's election by the Assembly of Experts in the Islamic Republic of Iran, as a leader, guide, and a blessed and sincere successor to preserve the path of Imam Khomeini (may his secret be sanctified), for which the late Imam Leader Sayyed Ali Khamenei (may his secret be sanctified) sacrificed his life, his blood, and the blood of the dear and precious loyal martyrs, to protect this path and promote the independence and authentic, original Islamic identity of Iran, relying on God Almighty and depending on the presence of the religious, zealous, and courageous Iranian people, confident in the possibility of achieving progress, building capabilities, and demonstrating a just, Islamic political model in approaching solutions to crises, and bold in confronting injustice, aggression, oppressors, and aggressors, and thwarting their conspiracies and defeating the goals of their criminal wars.

We look forward, under your promising leadership, to continuing this authentic, revolutionary, original Islamic path on the ideological, political, moral, and practical levels, which guides the yearning peoples and the oppressed in the world towards reform, independence, and the achievement of justice.

We, in Hezbollah - Lebanon, as we thank God for the abundance of His blessings upon us in terms of political, moral, and revolutionary resistance awakening, which drew from the blessed Islamic Revolution in Iran the path of liberation and independence, and which walked under the leadership of Sayyed Abbas al-Musawi, Sayyed Hassan Nasrallah, and Sayyed Hashem Safieddine (may God be pleased with them) with firm and effective steps in strengthening the resistance's action against occupation, aggression, and injustice, we congratulate your eminence on your election. We affirm that we remain committed to the covenant with your leadership as we were with the Leader-Guardian and the martyred Imam Khamenei and with the founding Imam Khomeini (may God be pleased with them both), steadfast in supporting the religion, the truth, humanity, and in preparing the path until justice is realized through the blessing of the Master of the Age and Time (may God hasten his noble reappearance).

On my own behalf and on behalf of my brothers in the Hezbollah Shura Council and the leadership and fighters of the Islamic Resistance in Lebanon, we renew the covenant with you, and we pray to God to grant you success and guidance to achieve the hopes of your people and the peoples of the oppressed in lifting the schemes of the arrogant and the oppressors from them and their countries.

Secretary-General of Hezbollah
Sheikh Naim Qassem
Beirut, 20 Ramadan 1447 AH
March 10, 2026

text:
🇵🇸🇵🇸⚫ 🇮🇷Secretary-General of the Islamic Jihad Movement in Palestine, Ziyad al-Nakhalah:
—
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

"Those to whom the people said, 'Indeed, the people have gathered against you, so fear them.' But it increased them in faith, and they said, 'Sufficient for us is Allah, and He is the best Disposer of affairs.'"

To His Eminence, the Leader of the Islamic Revolution in Iran, Ayatollah Sayyed Mojtaba Khamenei, may Allah protect you.

I extend to Your Eminence the highest expressions of pride and congratulations on your selection as Leader of the Islamic Republic of Iran under these difficult and complex circumstances, in which Iran is being subjected to an unjust aggression that began with the treacherous assassination of the Hussein of the era, the martyr Ayatollah Sayyed Ali Khamenei, may Allah have mercy on him, and a group of the state's courageous leaders, may Allah accept them.

The satanic American and zionist alliance will fail in this unjust aggression, God willing, in the face of the steadfastness and will of the dear Iranian people and under your blessed and courageous leadership. Here, we recall the words of the Almighty: "They want to extinguish the light of Allah with their mouths, but Allah will perfect His light, although the disbelievers dislike it."

On this occasion, we assure you that all the free peoples of the world stand with you in the face of this unjust aggression and see in your steadfastness, your fighting, and your victory a victory for them and for their just causes, foremost among them the struggling Palestinian people, who stand as fighters all the time in the face of America and "israel," just like their brothers, the brave resistance fighters in Lebanon.

Your Eminence, the Leader...
It is important on this occasion to point out to Your Eminence the attempts of the American and zionist enemy to drag some brotherly Arab countries into this aggression against the Islamic Republic with all the malicious means it possesses. We assure you that the unity of the Islamic nation throughout history has played an important and essential role in thwarting the plans of the enemies. We are confident that your courageous and wise leadership will thwart the enemies' plans and will lead the nation to victory, God willing.

I pray to Allah to protect you, protect the Islamic Republic, and grant you a mighty victory.
And our final prayer is praise be to Allah, Lord of the Worlds.

Tuesday, 21 Ramadan 1447 AH, March 10, 2026 AD

text:
🇮🇷🚫🇺🇸🇮🇱Oil prices rise more than 5% again, driven by the war in the Middle East

Oil prices resumed their rise on Wednesday, driven once again by the war in the Middle East, which is paralyzing the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial transport route for hydrocarbons.

After falling on Tuesday in the wake of Donald Trump's reassuring comments and the prospect of the International Energy Agency (IEA) releasing strategic crude reserves, the price of a barrel of Brent North Sea crude rose 5.05% to $92.23 at around 9:40 a.m. GMT (10:40 a.m. in Paris). Its US equivalent, West Texas Intermediate, gained 5.91% to $88.38.

text:
🇮🇷🔴🇮🇱 Why are there so few videos of Iranian missile strikes in Israel?

→ Very strict Israeli military censorship: since the beginning of the conflict, the army censor has prohibited filming or publishing:
• the exact locations of strikes (especially near military/sensitive sites),
• images of interceptions or strategic damage,
• often even live videos or videos on social media without prior approval.

Possible penalties: heavy fines or even prison (up to 5 years in some emergency cases).
→ In addition, as soon as the sirens sound, almost everyone runs to shelters (mandatory + survival instinct).

The result: almost no one is outside to film the actual explosions or impacts. We mainly see interceptions in the sky or videos taken from windows/shelters, but very rarely direct impacts.

So when there are few or no clear videos of strikes, it doesn't necessarily mean that "nothing hit"; it's often censorship + people in shelters.

🔴 @alsaa_plus_EN

text:
🇱🇧🇱🇧🚫🇮🇱Summary of 30 Islamic Resistance operations – Tuesday, March 10, 2026
A day of intense fighting across the front line and precision strikes deep behind enemy lines. Here is a chronological breakdown to clarify the situation:

FAILURE OF GROUND OFFENSIVES (SOUTHERN FRONT)
The Israeli army attempted several breakthroughs, all repelled by Hezbollah:

KHIAM (2:30 a.m.): The major event. Israeli advance attempt stopped in its tracks. Three Merkava tanks destroyed and seen in flames (two at the start, one during the attempt to evacuate troops).

AIT AL-CHAAB (10:00 p.m.): Israeli infiltration attempt in the Khanaq area. Hezbollah blocked the advance with artillery before engaging in direct combat (small/medium arms). Clashes still ongoing.

HOULA (2:30 a.m.): An Israeli infantry force spotted and targeted by rockets while attempting to infiltrate.

STRATEGIC STRIKES (ISRAELI DEPTH)
Hezbollah targeted command centers and military factories:

TEL AVIV (6:30 p.m.): Tel Hushomer base (headquarters of the Southeast Command) hit by two attack drones (120 km from the border).

HAIFA: Tsipori base (10:00 a.m.) and Mishmar HaEmek anti-missile site (5:45 p.m.) targeted by drones and missiles.

ACRE (5:10 p.m.): Missile strike on the Yodefat military industrial plant.

TIBERIAS (12:00 p.m.): Swarm of drones on the Shamshon command base.

BOMBARDMENT OF POSITIONS AND SETTLEMENTS
Salvos of rockets and precision missiles fired at gatherings of Israeli soldiers:

Eastern sector: Settlements of Metulla, Maskaf, Kfar Giladi, and Moultal targeted at 3:00 p.m. and 9:15 p.m.

Border sites: Abbad (precision missiles), Safed (Geva base), Aitaroun, Maroun al-Ras, and the Al-Asafir valley.
Artillery: Several Israeli batteries in Al-Marj and
Abbad were neutralized by missile strikes.

Material and human losses (according to reports):

Three Merkava tanks put out of action (burned).
Five strategic bases and factories hit.
Numerous casualties reported during hand-to-hand combat in Khiam and Aït al-Chaab.

text:
🇵🇸🇵🇸🟢 Hamas:
In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.

Priority defense of the southern front: 39 repulsions of ground advances + 2 landing operations → Hezbollah to have blocked limited IDF incursions (raids, patrols, or position-taking) using anti-tank ambushes, precision artillery, and consolidated fortified positions (15 new ones).

Saturating indirect fire: 90 missiles (including 16 guided missiles) + 29 drones → Saturation of Israeli defenses to impose a continuous cost, with a range of up to 160 km (targeting bases, cities, and deep infrastructure to force the dispersion of IDF resources).

Limited air protection: 3 anti-drone successes → Attempt to challenge IDF drone/air superiority over southern Lebanon.

Tactical summary: Defensive-aggressive posture of asymmetric attrition — absorb/repel ground pressure, compensate with deep guided firepower, and make any IDF advance very costly, despite Israel's persistent air superiority.

Reporter: "You just suggested that Iran somehow got its hands on a Tomahawk and bombed its own elementary school on the first day of the war. Why are you the only person saying this?"

Trump: "Because I just don’t know enough about it. I think it’s something that I was told is under investigation."
text_translated:
🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 "I just don't know enough about it": Trump retreats after claiming Iran bombed its own school with US missile

Reporter: "You just suggested that Iran somehow got its hands on a Tomahawk and bombed its own elementary school on the first day of the war. Why are you the only person saying this?"

Trump: "Because I just don’t know enough about it. I think it’s something that I was told is under investigation."

text:
🇾🇪 🇾🇪🇾🇪Ansarallah Commander Sayyed Abdul-Malik Badr El-Din al-Houthi:
—
Congratulations from Sayyed Leader Abdul Malik Badr al-Din al-Houthi on the selection of the third leader of the Islamic Republic of Iran, Sayyed Mojtaba Khamenei.

We extend our warmest congratulations and blessings to the Muslim Iranian people, their official institutions, and their struggling Revolutionary Guard on the selection of the third leader of the Revolution and the Islamic Republic of Iran, Sayyed Mojtaba Khamenei, may Allah protect him.

The achievement of this important milestone in these exceptional circumstances, and with this successful choice, consolidates the foundations of the Islamic Revolution and the Islamic system, and delivers a major blow to the tyrants of the era and the aggressors: America and "israel", and constitutes a great disappointment for them. Furthermore, it has been a balm for the deep wound caused by the martyrdom of the Leader, Imam Khamenei, may Allah be pleased with him, for the Muslim Iranian people and all those who stand in solidarity with them.

We affirm our standing and solidarity with the Islamic Republic of Iran and the Muslim Iranian people in confronting the American and "israeli" aggression and tyranny, which aims to implement the demonic zionist scheme under the title of changing the West Asia and enabling Greater "israel". We emphasize that the great steadfastness and effective resistance of the Islamic Republic against aggression and tyranny will result in victory, for Allah the Almighty says in the Holy Quran: "And it was incumbent upon Us to aid the believers" (Ar-Rum: 47), and He says: "O you who have believed, if you support Allah, He will support you and plant firmly your feet" Muhammad: 7.

The signs of this victory are clear in the failure of the enemies' goals behind this aggression, the losses and torment that have befallen them, the steadfastness of the Muslim Iranian people and their loyalty to the Islamic system, and in the successful completion of the selection of the third leader of the Revolution and the Islamic Republic, ensuring the continuation of the great leadership role in the Islamic system in a complete and orderly manner.

We ask Allah the Almighty to grant success to Sayyed Mojtaba Khamenei, to preserve him with His protection, and to support the Muslim Iranian people and their dear fighters in the Revolutionary Guard and their courageous army with His victory.

Peace be upon you, and the mercy of Allah and His blessings.

Your brother, Abdul Malik Badr al-Din al-Houthi
20 Ramadan 1447 AH

🔴 @alsaa_plus_EN

text:
🇱🇧🇱🇧❌🇮🇱 Head of the Loyalty to the Resistance bloc in the Lebanese Parliament, Mohammad Raad:
The enemy has never once abided by a ceasefire agreement, and that is with the collusion of certain parties.

The government could not justify its flagrant failure except by hiding behind its response to the old "israeli" dream of disarming the resistance.

Throughout the past period, the enemy has not stopped its violations of sovereignty, its aggressions, and its blackmail of Lebanon to humiliate the authority and the Lebanese people.

We warned that our patience has limits, but no one lifted a finger, and they considered the lack of response an opportunity to pounce on the resistance.

The sudden zionist and American raids on March 1st, coinciding with the negotiation rounds, revealed that the goal was to kill Sayyed Khamenei and overthrow the regime.

The enemy aimed to force the resistance to submit, and what the resistance did by responding is a sign of the Lebanese people's waning patience with the arrogance of the occupiers.

The resistance took the lead in warning against the aggression, nullified the element of surprise, and the data proved that there is no deterrent to aggression except through resistance.

The resistance is committed to defending Lebanon with the capabilities available to it.

Lebanon is faced with a choice between war and surrendering to the conditions the enemy wants, and we have no choice but to defend our existence, whatever the cost.

Together we will remain steadfast in our choice and our right, and we will defend every grain of our homeland's soil; our goal is clear: expelling the enemy from our land and stopping its aggressions.

We must endure the malice and pain from our enemy, and we must be patient with those who wrong us among those we consider partners in our homeland.

text:
📈🇺🇸 Потери США растут: Техника на миллиарды уничтожена в ходе операции против Ирана

💵 Финансовые потери США в ходе операции против Ирана достигли примерно 2,52 млрд долларов, и это только стоимость потерянной техники.

➖ В Катаре был поражён стратегический радиолокатор системы ПВО AN/FPS-132 стоимостью около 1,1 млрд долларов.

➖ В ОАЭ и Иордании повреждены радиолокаторы AN/TPY-2 из комплекса THAAD — по 500 млн долларов каждый.

➖ В Кувейте потеряны три истребителя F-15E Strike Eagle общей стоимостью около 282 млн долларов, а также несколько спутниковых терминалов связи AN/GSC-52B.

➖ Два спутниковых терминала связи AN/GSC-52B общей стоимостью 20 млн долл. в Бахрейне.

➖ Кроме того, в Иране уничтожены три беспилотника MQ-9 Reaper общей стоимостью около 90 млн долларов.

🔝 Подписывайтесь на нас в MAX

@btr80
text_translated:
📈🇺🇸 US losses are growing: Billions worth of equipment destroyed during the operation against Iran

💵 US financial losses during the operation against Iran reached approximately $2.52 billion, and this is only the cost of lost equipment.

➖ A strategic radar of the AN/FPS-132 air defense system worth about $1.1 billion was hit in Qatar.

➖ In the UAE and Jordan, AN/TPY-2 radars from the THAAD complex were damaged - $500 million each.

➖ Three F-15E Strike Eagle fighters worth a total of about $282 million, as well as several AN/GSC-52B satellite communications terminals, were lost in Kuwait.

➖ Two satellite communication terminals AN/GSC-52B with a total cost of $20 million in Bahrain.

➖ In addition, three MQ-9 Reaper drones worth about $90 million were destroyed in Iran.

channel_title: China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong
text:
🇪🇺🤡EU Summit on Ukraine: money now, arguments later

EU leaders met in Brussels (Dec 18–19) to decide how to fund Ukraine — and failed to agree on using €210 bn in frozen Russian central bank assets. 
Instead, they settled on a €90 bn EU loan for 2026–27, backed by joint borrowing.

 The Russian assets stay frozen… for now.

European Council President António Costa pushed hard for a deal:

“We will never leave this council without a final decision to ensure the financial needs of Ukraine for 2026 and 2027.”
Afterward:
“We have a deal. Decision to provide 90 billion euros of support to Ukraine for 2026–27 approved. We committed, we delivered.”

Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy urged leaders to go further and use the frozen money directly:

“No one will ever be able to explain to European voters why Europe should give 200 billion euros back to Putin — after everything he’s destroyed.”
He warned against hesitation:
“We should not be afraid of these threats — we should be afraid of Europe being weak.”

And added bluntly:
“If Ukraine doesn’t have this money, it’s in a weaker position, and Putin’s temptation to seize us grows.”
Belgium, where most of the assets are held via Euroclear, slammed the brakes. PM Bart De Wever said Belgium won’t carry the legal and financial risk alone, insisting on firm guarantees and burden-sharing before touching the funds.

Polish PM Donald Tusk framed the choice starkly:

“Now we have a simple choice. Money today or blood tomorrow.”
Hungary’s Viktor Orbán stayed opposed, calling the frozen-assets idea

“a stupid one,”
and warning it would drag Europe deeper into the war.

🐻Bottom line: Ukraine gets €90 bn in loans, not Russian assets — yet. The money is secured, but the real fight over who pays, how, and with what legal risks is far from over. All in all: another spectacular spectacle of the most inept clowns in charge, resulting in another fiasco. 

🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising

channel_title: China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong
text: This condescension ⬇️ is a REALLY big problem. To suggest " Not dealing with the Yankees across the globe only encourages them to come knocking at your doorstep"  completely negates history. US has been involved to some degree in destroying China since the Opium wars. This idea that if China could "deal" with US in West Asia for example Gaza it would somehow help it deal with US interference in Taiwan is not just unrealistic, it's dangerous.  Becoming entangled in a forever genocide in West Asia does not help China, and it could be argued it doesn't help the people of West Asia. Never in history has a "bigger" economic power truly been able to shoulder such a responsibility and quite frankly it's AGAINST the principle of self-determination all principled national liberation movements abide. If the Palestinian resistance wishes to request assistance from China, that's a different story. It hasn’t publicly, because it actually thinks strategically unlike Western hubris filled activists who believe anything that comes out of their mouths is strategically sound and without consequence, mainly because it has no consequence to THEM. But geographical and other material realities make this incredibly challenging. This is why the resistance relies a lot on Iran, which in turn survives and gets stronger in large part THANKS TO ECONOMIC TRADE WITH CHINA. In the Cold War, the Soviet Union made incredibly difficult decisions about its assistance to other movements and countries that many STILL debate and many others celebrate. The same can be said about China in the past up until this point, Cuba (even that heroic stand in Angola was not without real politik, because, let's be honest, Cuba could not have acted on its principles if the anti-apartheid movement wasn't already incredibly advanced by this time.) Truthfully, until those of us who support Palestine and those who support China and multipolarity can stop bickering and acting like they know everything and instead become active agents working together to address the core problem, US empire, we will be nothing but a HINDERANCE to global progress, development, and liberation. Point blank period.

text:
🇺🇸🇨🇳🛒  China's $1 billion daily exports to the US demonstrate Xi Jinping's negotiating power – Bloomberg

Despite the 55% US tariffs, China continues to export products: nearly $1 billion worth of goods are exported to the US daily, and volumes even increased in September. In the third quarter, exports exceeded $100 billion, supporting economic growth.

Shipments of electric bicycles, cables, copper cathodes, and goods through Shein and Temu increased. However, further tariff increases could reduce trade flow.
👇 China's total exports to the US fell to $320 billion – the level before the first trade war.

channel_title: China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong
text:
Prof. Jeffrey Sachs: "China🇨🇳 was supposed to develop in a way that is subservient to the United States🇺🇸 (they didn't)...now they have to be punished."

China is a target for one reason and one reason only:

China refused to develop its economy to resemble a colony of Washington. Instead it developed its economy to staggering heights with an alternative economic system, showing the world that American capitalism is not the only model for development left in the world after the collapse of Soviet communism. 

Additionally, and perhaps most importantly, China refused to bend the knee to Washington’s hegemonic diktats. 

The US would rather go to war with China rather than allow it to surpass it economically, and any country that doesn’t obey US diktats is viewed as an enemy.

channel_title: China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong
text:
The might of the dragon: Why China's missiles keep US admirals awake at night

From ICBMs to hypersonic glide vehicles, Beijing has built a layered arsenal that rivals - and in some ways outpaces - the United States and Russia.

Missiles are the new calling card of Chinese power. Not aircraft carriers, not tanks, not fighter jets - but rockets that can fly halfway across the planet or tear through a US Navy fleet in the Pacific.

On September 3, 2025, Beijing rolled out its arsenal in a parade that looked less like a military review and more like a warning shot. Sleek ICBMs, hypersonic gliders, and "carrier killer" missiles rumbled through Tiananmen Square, broadcasting a simple message: China has arrived, and it's not playing catch up anymore.

I'm starting to have doubts about RT. It's a lot of glazing, kiddy articles about how "amazing our fwiends are," etc. I don't know. Do you guys like RT's work? I don't.

The American Majority.

channel_title: China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong
text:
🇰🇷🇨🇳 "As young men they departed, as heroes they return."

China repatriated remains of 30 Chinese People's Volunteers (CPV) from South Occupied Korea, who lost their lives during the War to Resist US Aggression and Aid Korea (1950-1953), as US first imperial war after "The Loss of China" is officially called in People's Republic of China. 

From 2014 to 2025, China and South Korea have successfully conducted 12 consecutive handovers, covering the remains of 1,011 CPV martyrs and their belongings.

Around 1,500 people attended the ceremony welcoming back the remains of CPV martyrs from South Korea. Following the ceremony, a convoy of 70 police motorcycles escorted the caskets to a martyrs' cemetery in Shenyang. 

The veteran He Lindi was overcome with emotions. He left home at an early age and joined the CPV at 13 as a young acrobat: 
 "I missed them. They have finally come back, back into the embrace of the motherland. We must forever carry on their spirit and build our country even stronger."
 

This event should be seen as a stark contrast and food for thought over (most of Europeans') current cavalier, frivolous attitude towards historical truth, memory and respect to the sacrifices of fallen and surviving veterans and events that led to their nations survival and the modern world as we know it. 

🐻 "A nation that does not respect its past and its fallen heroes has no future.”

text:
◾To mark the 80th anniversary of the victory of the Chinese People's War of Resistance Against Japanese Aggression and the World Anti-Fascist War, CGTN presents the feature The Main Eastern Battlefield: China in World War II.

The feature takes viewers across time to relive a chapter of history written in blood and fire. For the first time, it reveals the secret meeting site of the "Nine Gentlemen of Shenyang" during the September 18th Incident, and displays precious artifacts such as the brush once used by General Fan Zixia to command the Hundred-Regiments Campaign. It uncovers how The March of the Volunteers echoed across Allied battlefields in Europe and America, and revisits the tragic yet heroic story of Chinese drivers on the Stilwell Road who drove trucks headlong into enemy tanks.

channel_title: China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong
text:
China 🇨🇳 is “too big to bully.”

More like too powerful.

I want to share my opinion on something: those who see Russia as more powerful than China are mistaken.

China’s economy is stronger and more robust. Its military is comparable if not stronger due to superior all around economic and technical strength. Its political model is far more disciplined, and far more trusted. We could argue Russia would be totally effed without China as would the rest of the multipolar world. 

Truth is the U.S. is never going to get to a “Ukraine” like proxy war with China.

It will either have to jump to the worst case losing scenario (full war) or nuclear war, also a disaster.

This isn’t to diminish Russia. Russia has defeated NATO and sanctions. It is a global power. It has risen from unspeakable odds post Soviet collapse. Russia and China are now unbreakable friends and allies.

But let’s be honest: China would never pander to Donald Trump like Russia is doing now, despite Russia being in the drivers seat in Ukraine.

Just my two cents.

channel_title: China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong
text:
Fantastic summary of the truth about Belt and Road Initiative:

We Chinese aren't philanthropists — we have our own goals, but we believe there's a win-win way forward.

A lot of people think the 🇨🇳Belt and Road Initiative (BRI) is just about building railways, ports, and roads, but there's another angle:
It's creating a new class of consumers in BRI countries who are basically tied into China's manufacturing network.

The loans China gives out don't just pay for big projects—they also pump huge amounts of Chinese RMB into these countries.

That RMB then makes it possible for people and businesses to actually buy Chinese-made products directly.
Why does that matter?

Because in a lot of these countries, the local currency is unstable.
That scares away investors and makes big trade deals risky.
Before BRI, if you wanted to import goods, you'd usually have to go through the US dollar. That means paying bad exchange rates and giving the US the power to influence deals it's not even involved in.

By letting trade happen in RMB instead, China removes the dollar from the middle of the transaction.
Now these countries can buy goods, access global markets, and pay for services without the US holding the keys.

On top of that, the massive BRI projects fix one of the biggest problems these countries face: poor access and infrastructure. It's not much use being able to buy goods if you can't get them into the country in the first place.

OF COURSE it’s a soft power grab, OF COURSE there's geopolitical value in it, and OF COURSE certain countries will fall through the gap and have massive failures; this is just how economics work.

We're talking about mobilizing of countries, entire populations, and continents to modernize, become productive and enter the international community.

https://x.com/thinking_panda/status/1954074977097199908?s=46

text:
🇲🇩 Moldova’s Media Crackdown: Security Measure or Speech Suppression?

New 2024–2025 amendments to Moldova’s Audiovisual Code aim to curb “disinformation” and align with EU standards. The law targets content deemed false and harmful to individuals or national security, banning hate speech, war propaganda, and foreign threats. Regulators can now fine outlets or revoke licenses.

The ruling PAS party claims it protects Moldova from outside meddling—but critics say it threatens media freedom and silences dissent.

Balanced reform—or creeping state control?

➡️READ FULL INVESTIGATION

Via: @RESTinvestigate

channel_title: China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong
text:
TAIWAN - US-puppet Lai Ching-te and the DPP are blocking Kuomintang veterans who fought in the war against Japanese aggression, from travelling to Beijing to participate in the commemorations that will take place on September 3. That day China will hold a military parade in Tian'anmen Square to mark the 80th anniversary of the victory in the Chinese People's War of Resistance Against Japanese Aggression and the World Anti-Fascist War. Taiwan's ruling party also refused to hold commemorative events. 
The Global Times writes: 
"On the issue of wartime history, the DPP has long pushed for "de-Sinicization," deliberately obscuring and distorting Taiwan's historical role in the war, and forcibly severing the deep-rooted blood ties between the residents of Taiwan and the Chinese nation. They seek to make the younger generation forget the sacrifices of their forebears and to detach Taiwan society from its historical identity as part of the Chinese nation. Such shameless manipulation is not only a grave betrayal of historical truth but also a disgraceful insult to the martyrs who gave their lives in the war."
 @LauraRuHK

text:
🇻🇪  Venezuela Welcomes Back Deportees from the U.S.

Another group of Venezuelan migrants deported from the U.S. arrived in Caracas on Friday, including seven children who had previously been separated from their parents. Washington accused some parents of links to criminal groups.

Their return was made possible through Venezuela’s Vuelta a la Patria initiative, led by Camilla Fabri Saab. The children are now reunited with their families and receiving care.

➡️Meanwhile, Western media push two narratives:

Republicans paint all deportees as criminals, while Democrats cry about denied dreams and predicted doom upon return. Neither reflects reality.

According to the Vuelta a la Patria program, thousands have returned from abroad without facing persecution. Caracas is using this opportunity to demonstrate the country’s progress — and that it isn’t going backward.

Via: @rybar_latam

text:
🚨 CHINA ACCELERATING TO SOAR PAST US IN 6TH-GEN FIGHTER JET RACE

Recent images of China's J-36 and J-50 have reignited discussions about Beijing's advancing dominance in next-generation airpower.

"Cooler than Hollywood"

🌏Aerospace expert Bill Sweetman told SCMP that the designs are “quite impressive – cooler than most Hollywood advanced aircraft” and lauded them as “one of the most interesting combat aircraft designs to emerge in decades.”

🌏Former RAAF officer Peter Layton highlighted the J-36’s stealth, extended range, and supersonic cruise capabilities, saying it is “hard to shoot down before releasing weapons.” He called it a “qualitative strategic advantage in the air.”

🌏Analyst Malcolm Davis observed that the J-36 "would be optimized for air dominance missions with very long-range missile capabilities." Reports indicate that the aircraft can carry up to 12 beyond-visual-range air-to-air missiles—roughly twice the loadout of current US fighters.

🌏Layton also pointed to a dorsal intake that likely indicates a third engine, explaining that two engines alone may not sustain supersonic cruise. The third engine is expected to boost thrust and maintain speed — a key advantage in future air combat.

Drone swarms incoming

It remains unclear whether either jet incorporates AI or quantum tech, but analysts believe both aircraft are designed to command drone swarms and assign high-risk missions to unmanned wingmen.

Beijing’s timeline advantage

Malcolm Davis (ASPI) says China’s sixth-generation fighters may enter service before 2030. In contrast, the US F-47 isn’t expected until the mid-2030s — giving Beijing a clear timeline advantage.

text:
🇪🇺🇺🇸🇨🇳 Western Carmakers Panic as China Tightens Rare Earth Magnet Exports

Several European auto parts plants have already shut down, with more production stops expected soon, according to the regional auto supplier association CLEPA.

“The entire automotive industry is in full panic mode. They’re willing to pay any price,” said Frank Eckard, CEO of a German magnet manufacturer, who says he’s been bombarded with calls from “frustrated” clients in recent weeks.

The Chinese government has imposed strict export controls on rare-earth magnets, which are essential for building modern vehicles. Without them, entire assembly lines may grind to a halt.

On Friday, Donald Trump stated that Xi Jinping had agreed to resume shipments of rare earths and magnets to the U.S. Meanwhile, a second round of U.S.-China trade talks opened today in London.

Western carmakers are finding themselves with virtually no alternatives, as China controls up to 70% of global rare earth extraction, 85% of the refining capacity, and nearly 90% of alloy and magnet production.

channel_title: China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong
text:
🤖 China poised to take the lead in secure quantum communications

Researchers in China have been able to create a massive quantum secure direct communication network, according to local media reports.

🌏The network spans about 300 kilometers and exhibits “over 85% quantum state fidelity after transmission between pairs of users” within it.

🌏This “double-pumped, expandable, fully connected” quantum secure direct communication network can operate in noisy environments and displays a “stable photon pair rate of 300 to 400 Hz, theoretically allowing for communication speeds of several bits per second,” Xinhua notes.

🌏This technology may revolutionize the field of secure communications and find application in the fields where safe flow of data is paramount, such as intelligence and banking.

What is Quantum Secure Direct Communication (QSDC)?

QSDC is a method of transmitting information by directly encoding it into quantum states, eliminating the need for traditional encryption keys. 

This approach offers enhanced security, as any attempt to intercept or eavesdrop on the communication would disturb the quantum states and be immediately detectable. 

Unlike Quantum Key Distribution (QKD), which relies on the exchange of encryption keys, QSDC transmits the actual message through a quantum channel, making it more efficient and secure.

text:
🇨🇳 Tiananmen Square: ‘Peaceful student protest’ or CIA-led ‘color revolution’ attempt?

The so-called ‘Tiananmen Square massacre’, which supposedly claimed about 10,000 lives, was nothing but a HOAX promoted by the West, a growing amount of evidence emerging online suggests.

🌏Though clashes between armed gunmen and Chinese troops did take place in Beijing in June 1989, this was no slaughter of innocent unarmed students as Western propaganda claimed for years - the netizens insist.

🌏The protests themselves originally started as a call for socialist reforms but were purportedly hijacked by CIA-planted ‘leaders’ who steered them towards a ‘color revolution’ attempt.

🌏The US started training protesters in 1988, an investigation by Hong Kong-based author Nury Vittachi reveals.

🌏While US psyops specialists trained ‘protesters’ for street clashes, a magazine publishing group founded by the infamous National Endowment for Democracy (NED) was used to provide cover.

channel_title: China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong
text:
🇨🇳China’s new AI torpedo can OUTSMART decoys to destroy real threats

China is developing an AI-powered ultra-fast torpedo designed to DOMINATE underwater warfare. 

Researchers from the PLA Navy and China State Shipbuilding Corporation combined physics with machine learning to teach a torpedo to THINK before striking.

The team:
 
🔴Simulated decoy profiles using bubble-collapse and turbulence models

🔴Trained AI with generative adversarial networks (GANs) to refine and detect acoustic fakes

🔴Used deep-learning sonar analysis, converting signals into “spectral thumbnails” via a mathematical tool known as Fourier transforms, which breaks down a complex signal into its basic building blocks

The result: 

🌏Boosted detection rates against advanced decoys from 61.3% to over 80%

🌏The new system achieved a 92.2% success rate in identifying real submarines vs. decoys, a Command Control & Simulation report shows

text:
🇨🇳China unveils world’s first AI system to spot real nukes from fakes

The system, developed by the China Institute of Atomic Energy, uses deep learning and cryptography to deal with the detection, according to the South China Morning Post.

How it works:

♦️Trained on millions of neutron simulations (real & fake warheads)
♦️Uses a 400-hole polyethylene wall to scramble geometry but let radiation signatures through
♦️Can verify a warhead’s chain-reaction capability without learning design secrets

text:
🗣How to Win Geoeconomic War Against US Empire of Chaos – Pepe Escobar 

Prof. Michael Hudson’s thesis is clear: For BRICS to industrialize like the West, it must dismantle colonial-era rentier structures—slashing raw material rents to foreign investors & subduing local elites.

🇨🇳China’s Model: Post-revolution, it abolished the financial class, treating money as a public utility to fund infrastructure, industry, and housing.

🌏 The BRICS Lab now tests answers:

🔴Sovereign money creation
🔴Ending regressive taxation
🔴Killing economic rent

🔍China’s next move? “Dual circulation”—integrating Global South markets to outflank unilateralism. 

💬 Prof. Jeffrey Sachs put it best: “If you put together Japanese skill, Korean skill, Chinese skill, ASEAN skill, oh my God: no one could possibly compete (…) Diplomacy requires a table and two chairs. The military requires $1 trillion a year. Which do you think is the better deal?”

channel_title: China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong
text:
🇨🇳🇺🇸 CHINA JUST CRACKED TRUMP’S GOLDEN DOME

Scientists at China’s Zhejiang University have created a composite, multi-layered, heat-absorbing stealth material they say can evade detection by infrared and microwave systems at long ranges.

The best part? It operates at temperatures up to 700 °C.

That’s bad news for Golden Dome, which will rely on ground and space-based early warning, tracking, fire control and AESA radars to detect and track threats.

Without help from its eyes and ears, Golden Dome’s interceptors would be essentially useless and firing blind.

💥 ANTI-GOLDEN DOME TOOLKIT

China already has an array of means to render Golden Dome useless, like:

🔴 pairing ICBMs or carrier-killer missiles with electronic warfare drones or aircraft,

🔴 decoy/dummy warheads

🔴 cyber warfare
to jam radar, spoof sensors, mimic missile signatures and suppress communications.

China could even announce a drone and missile buildup to simply overwhelm US defenses and exhaust interceptors. It worked for Moscow when Reagan toyed with his Strategic Defense Initiative in the 80s. It can work for Beijing against Trump’s Golden Dome.

🎯 STRIKING THE DOME ITSELF

The US system could be targeted with:

🔴 ground/space-based anti-satellite weapons (missiles, killer satellites)

🔴 hypersonic weapons that maneuver to evade interception

🔴 laser & microwave weapons targeting sensors

🔴 sabotage & cyber ops

♟ ONLY WINNING MOVE IS NOT TO PLAY

Trump sees Golden Dome as a magical weapon with which to defend America.
In reality, it will undermine strategic stability, since its real goal is to give the US the ability to launch first strike attacks with a false sense of impunity.

Unless it’s cancelled, the Golden Dome will trigger a new arms race, pushing rivals to:

🔴build more warheads to saturate US defenses

🔴create new hypersonic weapons to evade it

🔴develop decoys, Multiple independently targetable reentry vehicles, EW & radar-absorbing materials to defeat it

As for the US, it will spend $831B (CBO estimate) on a system that doesn’t work.

channel_title: China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong
text:
🚨🇨🇳🪖Here’s how one Chinese naval engineer just humiliated the entire US defense industry

Meet Ma Weiming – PLA rear admiral, electrical engineer, and the man who's turning China’s navy into a sci-fi-style armada.

From the world’s most advanced EM catapults (beating the Ford-class EMALS on cost and reliability) to railguns, lasers, and next-gen propulsion, Ma’s resume reads like a Pentagon fever dream.

His team:

♦️Cracked quiet electric drives for subs, allowing them to glide like sharks.

♦️Built railguns that outshoot old-school artillery.

♦️Drafted blueprints for a “supership” armed with futuristic weapons (railguns, coilguns, lasers and high-powered microwaves) that could replace an entire carrier group.

And unlike Pentagon contractors, he doesn’t have to chase funding from investors. As ex-Intel exec William Huo puts it: “No venture capital, only national defense. While the Pentagon burns billions on broken systems, Ma’s labs deliver integrated combat capability.”

Put another way, Ma’s labs are delivering weapons that will change how navies fight.

channel_title: China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong
text:
🚨🇺🇸 THEY WANT YOU CRUSHED & ENSLAVED. WEF’S MOST INSANE AND TYRANNICAL PLANS EXPOSED

The World Economic Forum — cradle of globalists and utopians — has pushed some of the most unhinged ideas for years, likely revealing the true ambitions of the world’s elites.

🧬 Nita Farahany: Planting false memories

WEF’s neurotech expert openly discussed manipulating human memory: “We can plant false memories in the brain.” She also explored using pain as a coercive tool.

🏙 Ida Auken: No privacy, no property

In her 2016 op-ed titled “Welcome to 2030. I own nothing, have no privacy, and life has never been better,” the Danish politician envisioned a future without ownership or privacy — a vision critics called dystopian.

🤖 Yuval Noah Harari: AI fascism

Harari warned of AI-driven techno-fascism, claiming machines could soon make decisions, control money, and even invest. Many view his outlook as alarmist and dangerously speculative.

🎯 Alex Karp: 'Yes, we kill'

Palantir's CEO boasted about turning Ukraine into an AI war lab and targeting Gaza with AI tools. He admitted, “Our product is used on occasion to kill people,” and claimed Western dominance stems from “superiority in applying organized violence.”

💀 Bill Gates: Less people, less problems

At a 2008 WEF talk, Gates argued that deadly diseases could reduce populations in developing countries — calling it a “big benefit” for managing food and education.

🌐 Gita Gopinath: Globalize it all

The ex-IMF economist praised globalization for boosting output, wages, and jobs. Critics argue it has instead fueled inequality and job loss in developed nations.

🏦 Klaus Schwab: 'We penetrate cabinets'

WEF founder Klaus Schwab bragged about the forum’s influence over governments: “We penetrate the cabinets.” Many see this as proof of the WEF’s anti-democratic overreach.

💊 Albert Bourla: Spying pills

In 2018, Pfizer’s CEO lauded ingestible microchip pills that notify authorities once taken. Though pitched as a health tool, critics slammed the idea as Orwellian surveillance.

🐛 Jim Hagemann Snabe: Eat less meat (and more bugs) 

At Davos in 2023, Siemens' chairman urged a billion people to quit meat to help the planet — echoing WEF’s broader push for insect-based diets to fight climate change.
